legalNotice.name: Giancarlo Papa
legalNotice.note: This is a personal portfolio website. No VAT number or commercial registration applies.

dataCollection.label: Contact form
dataCollection.description: name, email address, and message. Used solely to respond to your inquiry. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR / nDSG legitimate interest.

dataCollection.label: Booking
dataCollection.description: name, email address, timezone, and optional session notes. Passed to Cal.com to create a calendar appointment. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR — pre-contractual steps.

dataCollection.label: Authentication
dataCollection.description: when you sign in via GitHub, Google, or LinkedIn, I receive your name, email address, and profile picture from that provider. This is stored in a secure, HTTP-only session cookie for the duration of your visit only. It is not persisted in any database.

dataCollection.label: Server logs
dataCollection.description: Vercel may log IP addresses and request metadata for security and performance purposes. I do not access or process these logs for marketing purposes.

cookies.name: Session cookie
cookies.description: an HTTP-only cookie used to maintain your authenticated session. It is set only when you sign in and is deleted when you sign out or the session expires.

cookies.name: Google Analytics cookies
cookies.description: this site uses Google Analytics 4 to understand visitor engagement (pages visited, referral sources, approximate location). These cookies are set automatically on every visit. No personally identifiable information is collected. Data is retained for 26 months by Google.

privacy.processorNote: US-based processors operate under Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) or equivalent transfer mechanisms recognised under Swiss and EU law.
privacy.retention: Contact and booking messages are retained only as long as necessary to handle your inquiry. Session data is deleted when you sign out or the session expires. No personal data is stored in a persistent database by this site.
rights: Access the personal data I hold about you
Request correction or deletion of your data
Lodge a complaint with the Swiss Federal Data Protection Commissioner (FDPIC) or your local supervisory authority

sections.title: Accuracy of content
sections.content: The content of this website is provided for general information and personal portfolio purposes only. While I strive for accuracy, I make no warranties — express or implied — about completeness, reliability, or fitness for a particular purpose. Information may become outdated without notice.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: This site may contain links to third-party websites. These links are provided for convenience only. I have no control over the content of linked sites and accept no responsibility for them or for any loss or damage that may arise from your use of them.

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.content: All original content on this website — including text, writing, and visual design — is © {year} Giancarlo Papa. All rights reserved. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works from the content without prior written permission.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, I accept no liability for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of this website or reliance on its content.

sections.title: Governing law & jurisdiction
sections.content: This website is operated from Switzerland. Any disputes relating to this website or its content shall be governed exclusively by Swiss law. The courts of the Canton of Zürich shall have exclusive jurisdiction, subject to mandatory provisions of applicable consumer protection law.
